title: Samboat boat hire: a smart alternative for 2026 travel
html:
If you are researching boat hire in Samboat, the market leader is not your only option. BoatHire24 offers a fresh alternative with verified listings across the Côte d'Azur, from the Old Port of Cannes to the marina of Saint-Tropez, with prices starting around €350 for a half-day motorboat charter. Whether you want a skippered yacht or a bareboat, you can compare real owner listings without the crowds.

Where to set off in Samboat

The term 'Samboat' is sometimes used loosely to mean the French Riviera, but here we mean the real departure points. The Old Port of Cannes (Vieux Port) is the busiest, with easy access to the Lérins Islands. Port Vauban in Antibes is Europe's largest marina and a base for superyachts. Further west, Port Grimaud offers a Venetian-style village, while the port of Saint-Tropez is ideal for glamorous day trips to Pampelonne Bay. For a quieter start, the Bay of Villefranche provides deep-water mooring with stunning views.

Which boat to rent

Your choice of boat depends on group size, experience and budget. Here are the most popular options in Samboat.

  1. Skippered motor yacht, perfect for a day of luxury, up to 12 guests, from €1,200 full-day. For a premium example, browse the Maiora 26m for hire, which includes a captain and crew.
  2. Bareboat motorboat, ideal for experienced skippers, up to 6 guests, from €350 half-day.
  3. Catamaran, stable and spacious, great for families, up to 10 guests, from €900 full-day.
  4. Rib or speedboat, fast and fun for watersports, up to 5 guests, from €280 half-day.
  5. Sailing yacht, classic experience, up to 8 guests, from €600 full-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Samboat?

Prices vary by season and boat type, but you can expect to pay from €280 to €1,500 per day.

  • Shared tour: €60, €90 per person for a 2-hour sightseeing trip
  • Small motorboat half-day (4h): €350, €500 for up to 6 guests
  • Catamaran full-day: €900, €1,400 for up to 10 guests
  • Crewed yacht full-day: €1,200, €2,500 for up to 12 guests, including fuel.

Compared to the main Samboat platform, BoatHire24 often presents better value. To see specific options, find a skippered charter and compare verified prices directly from owners.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Samboat?

In France, a boating licence is required for most powerboats over a certain power threshold, but many charters include a skipper.

If you hold an ICC (International Certificate of Competence) or a French permis bateau, you can rent a bareboat. For sailing catamarans the rules are similar. Always check with the operator, they confirm exact requirements before booking.

In July and August, the Mistral wind can blow strongly in the afternoon, so book a morning slot for smoother cruising, especially around the Lérins Islands.

At a glance

  • Price band: €280, €2,500 per day
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: 2-hour tours to full-day charters
  • Capacity: 2, 12 guests on most boats
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Samboat

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Samboat?

Yes, many boats come with a skipper, so no licence is needed on your part; you simply enjoy the ride.

What is the best time of year for boating in Samboat?

The best months are May to October, with July and August being the warmest and busiest, while September offers settled weather and fewer crowds.

How far is it from Cannes to the Lérins Islands by boat?

The distance from Cannes Old Port to Île Sainte-Marguerite is only about 1.5 nautical miles, a quick 15-minute crossing.

Are fuel and crew included in the charter price?

On skippered charters fuel and crew are almost always included, but check the listing details to be sure.

Practical tips for booking

To secure your preferred date, book at least two weeks ahead in peak season. Most boats depart from Cannes, Antibes or Saint-Tropez. For a smooth experience, refer to the booking FAQ for cancellation policies and safety requirements.

BoatHire24 connects you directly with boat owners worldwide. If you own a boat in Samboat, check availability on boathire24.com and list your vessel to reach thousands of travellers. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Samboat or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Samboat and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
